briefdescription.para: Allocates memory for co_nmt_rdn_t object using allocator from can_net_t.
Frees memory allocated for co_nmt_rdn_t object.
Initializes co_nmt_rdn_t object.
Finalizes co_nmt_rdn_t object.
Implements the bus toggling mechanism as defined by ECSS-E-ST-50-15C.
The CAN bus toggle timer callback function for a redundancy manager.
Check sub-index 0 (Highest sub-index supported)
Check sub-index 1 (Bdefault)
Check sub-index 2 (Ttoggle)
Check sub-index 3 (Ntoggle)
Check sub-index 4 (Ctoggle)
Checks if the structure of the Redundancy object conforms to ECSS.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a CANopen device.

simplesect.para: true if the Redundancy Object is conformant (or not present), and false if not.

briefdescription.para: Returns the alignment (in bytes) of the co_nmt_rdn_t structure.
Returns the size (in bytes) of the co_nmt_rdn_t structure.
Creates a new CANopen NMT redundancy management service.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a CAN network.
a pointer to an NMT master/slave service.

simplesect.para: a pointer to a new redundancy manger service, or NULL on error. In the latter case, the error code can be obtained with get_errc().

briefdescription.para: Destroys a CANopen NMT heartbeat consumer service.
Returns a pointer to the allocator used to allocate the NMT redundancy manager service.
Selects the default bus (Bdefault) as active.

detaileddescription.para: For slave nodes starts bus toggle timer.

briefdescription.para: Sets currently active bus as default (Bdefault) and reset counters.
Registers a missed Redundancy Master heartbeat message event.
Sets the alternate CAN bus identifier which the NMT redundancy manager service could utilize.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to an NMT redundancy manager service.

briefdescription.para: Sets the Redundancy Master's Node-ID.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to an NMT redundancy manager service.
the Redundancy Master's Node-ID (in the range [1..127]).
the Redundancy Master's heartbeat time (in milliseconds).

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or -1 on error. In the latter case, the error code can be obtained with get_errc().

briefdescription.para: Returns the Redundancy Master node-ID.
This file is part of the CANopen library; it contains the implementation of the NMT redundancy manager functions.

detaileddescription.para:
lely/co/nmt_rdn.h
2021 N7 Space Sp. z o.o.
The NMT redundancy manager was developed under a programme of, and funded by, the European Space Agency.
